caption: Can a Bulgarian medical degree be recognised in Ireland? EU medical qualifications can fall under the EU system of automatic professional recognition, subject to the Medical Council registration process. No medical degree guarantees an Irish job or Intern Year post. Comment DOCTOR and I'll send you the free 15-minute call link. No pitch, no pressure.
note: FALLBACK ONLY. Primary is Zernio at 19:00 Irish (server-side). This fires at 19:20 only if Zernio did not post; run_queue.py checks the live feed first and deletes this entry if it did.
